main_post.text:
🚀 GitHub Release v0.1.6: Webhook Pipeline Test

This release validates a complete event notification flow:

📡 GitHub Release Event
    ↓
🔗 GitHub App Webhook
    ↓
☁️ Cloudflare Worker (serverless processing)
    ↓
🤖 Discord Bot API
    ↓
💬 Channel Notification

Key highlights:
• Real-time webhook integration
• Serverless architecture with Cloudflare Workers
• Discord delivery for community alerts
• Safe testing in temporary repository
• 7 releases in 2 days = rapid iteration cycle

Repository: github-account-scanner detection test sample
Purpose: End-to-end webhook validation

$ONIAGI
